name: @omni-wasm/sql
description: Browser-native SQL (SQLite) execution via WebAssembly. Own build from source, no server required.

scripts.build:wasm: docker build -t omni-wasm-sql . && docker run --rm -v $(pwd)/dist/wasm:/output omni-wasm-sql
scripts.build:all: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
scripts.copy:wasm: mkdir -p dist/wasm && cp -r src/wasm/* dist/wasm/ 2>/dev/null || true

author: Sergio De Vita
